_comment: OPTIONAL external-stdio literature-server config, used ONLY when research/research_parallel.py runs with lit_mode='external' (--external-mcp). The DEFAULT is lit_mode='inprocess', which serves PubMed/OpenAlex/Crossref from an in-process SDK MCP server (research/literature.py) and does NOT read this file — nothing to install. In external mode the server names pubmed / biorxiv / openalex are required (EXPECTED_EXTERNAL_SERVERS) and the read-only allowlist is derived from them as mcp__pubmed__*, mcp__biorxiv__*, mcp__openalex__*. ${VAR} placeholders are substituted from os.environ (loaded from the repo .env); no secret values are stored here. These are the third-party community servers pinned in docs/INSTALL_MCP.md (Option B) — they run with your local privileges, so review/pin them and CONFIRM each server's exact env-var names against its README before use, then verify with `claude mcp list` / `/mcp`. The interactive-only plugin path (lit_mode='plugin', --plugin) also does NOT read this file.
